case_title: FRANCES TORRES VS. BENITO SOLIS et al

docket_entries.description: OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TORRES, FRANCES AS TO DEFENDANT SOLIS, BENITO DOES 1 TO 20 SOLIS, CARMEN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-30-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-28-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-15-2009
APPLICATIN FOR TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER TO STOP POSSESSION OF CARMEN'S RESTAURANT AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SSAID TRO SHOULD NOT BECOME PERMANENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TORRES, FRANCES
ORDER - TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER TO STOP DEFENDANTS FROM SELLING CARMEN'S RESTAURANT AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SAID TRO SHOULD NOT BECOME PERMANENT
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON WHETHER TRO SHALL BECOME PERMANENT HEARING SET FOR SEP-16-2008 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, ARGUED AND THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF FRANCES TORRES' ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON WHETHER THE TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER SHALL BECOME PERMANENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-16-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-16-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-16-2008 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST FRANCES TORRES, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-16-2008 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-31-2008. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MARY ELLEN SCHERER, CSR# 5208. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-16-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JAN-30-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-16-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST FRANCES TORRES FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-16-2009, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE APR-01-2009. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LOIS JONES, CSR# 3689. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-16-2009 CONTINUED TO MAY-18-2009 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-18-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-18-2009 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: LOIS JONES, CSR# 3689. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-18-2009 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Lois Jones, CSR# 3689. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2009 Continued To May-18-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 5/18/2009 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Lois Jones, CSR# 3689. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-14-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-16-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-16-2008 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Mary Ellen Scherer, CSR# 5208. (212)

Order To Show Cause Hearing On Whether Tro Shall Become Permanent
Off Calendar Sep-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Dennis Mesina (788.8811) for defendant and responding party
Frances Torres (650.455.6556) plaintiff and moving party appearing in propria persona

Argued and the Court ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF FRANCES TORRES' ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON WHETHER THE TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER SHALL BECOME PERMANENT is denied without prejudice. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
